images.title: Palourdes utilisées dans le cadre du projet Clim Clam (Ifremer 00945-105720 - 54557).jpg
images.description: ClimClam is a CNRS International Research Project (IRP) that brings together two research groups (LEMAR-UBO, and BCA-UNIPD, Italy) to study in complementarity the effects of climate change on the Japanese clam using an integrative biology approach.

images.title: Suivi physiologique de bivalves (Ifremer 00702-81383 - 33939).jpg
images.description: This marine biologist is interested in the effects of microplastics and associated chemical contaminants, because plastic waste can release into the environment a set of chemical compounds that are incorporated during their manufacture. The experiment carried out within the Invertebrate Physiology Laboratory as part of the PPP ("Preventing Plastic Pollution") project aimed to study the effects of chemical compounds released by tires on the feeding and respiration of the cupped oyster. To learn more about the " Preventing Plastic Pollution " project.
